name: Bohnert Park
description: Bohnert Park is a place to play pickleball in Jasper, IN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Buehler Park
description: Buehler Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jasper, IN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.
